title: Secretary Spec — Daily Content Journal (the Reservoir)
spec_type: subsystem + schema + views + optional reflection pass
core_claim: One entry per day capturing discoveries, novel framework moves, or active work — with media. Goal is reservoir, not publication. Separating capture from publication is what makes the content flywheel work.
optional_v1_5: Cheap-model reflection pass per new entry: auto-suggest tags, related bedrock, surface match. Jake accepts/rejects — same pattern as chat reflections.
streak_candidate: journal_entry_today (Jake flagged as probably single most valuable streak — compounds directly into public-surface development)

downstream: public_surface_build (surfaces pull FROM the journal when assembling content)
soft: TCL cross-reference with notable[] items — same event, different lens

structural_note: Capture end of the content flywheel (public_surface_build is emission end). Three-layer memory mapping: journal = conscious-capture, TCL = session-residue, bedrock = crystallized.
open_questions: Minimum viable entry (prevent gaming vs. avoid break-prone streaks on low-energy days)?
Tag vocabulary evolution: free-text + cleanup vs. controlled from start?
Attachment storage quota / sync behavior (video gets big)?
Reflection pass cadence: on-write vs. batched nightly?
Auto-queue to public_surface_build backlogs vs. manual pull?
